name: pr_rl10
drl:
rule R0 salience -5 when T0(f1 == false) T1($g : g0) not T2() then end
rule Rout salience -10 when $p : T0(f1 == false, f0 == 0) then modify($p) { setF1(true) } end
rule Rmid salience -15 when T0(f1 == true, f0 == 0) then insert(new T1(7)); insert(new T1(8)); end
rule Rmid2 when T0(f0 == 1, f1 == false) then insert(new T1(50)); end
